title: lindera selangorensis
intro: Lindera selangorensis, also known as Selangor bay leaf or selangor spice tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It is native to Malaysia, particularly in the state of Selangore. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lindera selangorensis include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating digestive issues, and it can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules.
